pi_items.source: setup_jitsi.sh line 41 confirms the reference docker-compose.yml is copied to this location; export_result.sh line 15 reads this file
export_result.sh line 38 references this path; task description requires report creation at this location
Task description specifies the service should be named 'jvb2'; consistent with Jitsi scaling conventions for multiple JVB instances
Task description specifies container name as 'jitsi-jvb2'; consistent with naming pattern of first JVB container which defaults to service name

Reference docker-compose.yml shows first JVB uses port 10000/udp (line 116); task specifies second JVB should use 10001/udp; supported by Jitsi documentation on incremental port allocation for multiple JVB instances
Task description requires JVB_OSERVER_WS_SERVER_ID (or similar WebSocket ID variable) set to 'jvb2'; value is correct, but variable name contains error

privileged_info_summary: The task scales a Jitsi Meet deployment by adding a second JVB instance. The configuration file is located at /home/ga/jitsi/docker-compose.yml and the report file should be created at /home/ga/jvb_scale_report.txt. The second JVB service is named 'jvb2' with container name 'jitsi-jvb2'. The UDP port for the second JVB is 10001 (incremented from the first JVB's port 10000). The WebSocket server ID value is correctly specified as 'jvb2'. The data is synthetic and generated by the task environment setup scripts.
